title: Encrypting data may expose sensitive information
description: This rule checks for hard-coded sensitive data (e.g., passwords, API keys) in clear text.
recommendation: Encrypt sensitive data before storing or transmitting.

compliant.description: API key generated with cryptographically secure random values

why_is_this_an_issue: Hard-coded sensitive data can be easily exposed in the source code, leading to unauthorized access and data breaches.
how_to_fix: Encrypt sensitive data using a secure method, such as a cryptographic library.
